title: FPS Boost:Optimized
description: A mod to increase FPS and optimize gameplay
body:
![FPS Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3faba07641f05243cb3bbeec7d91b770ae13a7e.png)
🚀 FPS Boost: Optimized
Tired of lag, frame drops, and long load times? FPS Boost isn’t just a random collection of mods. It’s a thoroughly tested and balanced ecosystem that reworks the Minecraft engine to squeeze the maximum performance out of any hardware without sacrificing image quality.

Why choose this build?

♾️ Versatility (All versions and launchers): It doesn’t matter which version you’re playing or which launcher you prefer. The build is compatible with many popular versions and platforms—just download and play!

⚡ Fast updates: The ecosystem is kept up to date. As soon as important optimization patches are released, the build is promptly updated so you always get the freshest and most stable version without conflicts.

💎 Full shader support: Want beautiful graphics? Run any modern shader packs with minimal impact on FPS thanks to advanced rendering technologies.

🧠 Radical resource savings: Smart tuning reduces RAM usage by 30–50%. This makes a huge difference for laptop and budget PC owners.

👁️ Smart rendering: Algorithms have been implemented in the game to disable the processing of invisible entities and blocks. Your CPU will no longer waste energy on what’s behind a wall.

⏱️ Instant interface response: No lag when opening your inventory, menus, or chests. Everything runs smoothly and lightning-fast.

Ready to breathe new life into your Minecraft? This configuration will turn even a “sluggish PC” into a powerful gaming machine!
